strategy: Team fight at 25,000 Health. He resists every school 21% with no weak school, so bring your strongest hit, Spectral Blast, or off-school prisms.
Hold blades and traps until the Round you hit. Each blade you cast gives him a Balanceblade, and each trap drops an Elemental Trap on you.
Set up in one burst. Blade and trap the same Round the hitter fires so he cannot answer with his own buffs.
Bring Triage for his Scald damage-over-time.
Frame it as a team fight: one dedicated hitter, supports feeding blades only on the hit Round, and a healer clearing Scald.
cheatNotes: He opens with Power Play, a global that speeds pip gain, so expect him to have pips fast.
Every trap you cast makes him drop an Elemental Trap on you instead of himself. Trap only right before you hit.
Every blade you cast gives him a Balanceblade. Minimize blading, or blade the same Round you hit.
He applies Scald, a Fire damage-over-time, on an unknown trigger. Bring Triage to clear it.
